description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte gray and black finish, accented by orange highlights near the stock and receiver. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. It has a skeletonized stock with an angular, ergonomic shape for improved handling and reduced weight. The rifle includes a prominent top rail for mounting optics, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control during firing. The barrel is short and compact, suitable for close-quarters urban environments, and the magazine appears to be detachable, integrated into the lower receiver. The overall design suggests a focus on maneuverability and modularity, ideal for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, compact tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, gray and black body, orange accents, and a detachable magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, skeletonized stock, orange accent, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, top rail, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, receiver, and magazine area with visible orange accent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock's open structure and the alignment of the top rail.
